headline: Shopify Stock And The Peril Of A Personal Best
summary: The e-commerce giant's growth story is impressive, but its biggest vulnerability may be a profitability metric that has soared far above its own history.

headline: Adobe (ADBE) Stock Looks Like A Bargain Despite AI Risks
summary: Adobe stock has fallen about 63% over the past five years, yet current valuation checks suggest it now screens as cheap on several measures. This creates a clear tension between weak long term returns and a more supportive current price tag. The roughly 63% decline over five years means long term holders have seen significant value eroded, so any case for Adobe today rests heavily on views about the current price rather than the past share chart. Adobe's push into generative AI tools and the...

headline: airSlate Appoints Former Adobe Executive Claude Alexandre as President
summary: Claude Alexandre Claude Alexandre is the new president of airSlate, July 2026 BOSTON, July 06, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- airSlate, a global SaaS company whose AI-powered products - including SignNow, pdfFiller, DocHub, altaFlow, and US Legal Forms - help more than 430 million SMB users worldwide edit and sign documents, automate workflows, and acquire new customers, announced the appointment of Claude Alexandre as President.
